affiliation.legalName: Center for Space and Atmospheric Research, Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University

description: UniversalFFT is an open-source multi-language library (Python, C, MATLAB, R) implementing the Fourier transform conventions described by Boteler (2012) for physically correct geoscience applications. It provides two discrete Fourier transform pairs — Continuous–Continuous and Continuous–Discrete — ensuring that single-transform operations such as impulse-response recovery and periodic-spectrum determination are consistent with the Fourier integral and Parseval's theorem.

referencePublication.name: On Choosing Fourier Transforms for Practical Geoscience Applications

name: UniversalFFT: A multi-language FFT/IFFT wrapper library for physically correct geoscience Fourier transforms
